description:

𝘚𝘵𝘢𝘳𝘵𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘔𝘦𝘴𝘴𝘢𝘨𝘦:

“Hobie.” You whisper sternly. “sit still.” Hobie huffs against the back of your neck, his thigh twitching a bit as youre sitting on his lap, his cock nestled deep inside of you. “Sweetheart..” he mumbles, no, whines. You're seated at your desk, doing some much needed work on your computer. You promised Hobie youd take care of him if he was able to wait until you were finished. But with how warm and tight you were around him, he wasn’t sure he could wait
